'''Aesolian''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]]<ref name="DangerousGames" /> located within the [[Aesolian system/Legends|Aesolian system]], a part of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy's]] [[Wild Space/Legends|Wild Space]] region.<ref name="EAOC" /> It was the [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of bulky [[Species/Legends|creatures]] known as [[treton]]s. They had pointed [[Ear/Legends|ears]] and were capable of emitting fierce snarls.<ref name="DangerousGames" />

==Behind the scenes==
Aesolian was first mentioned in the [[2002]] young readers novel ''[[Jedi Quest: The Dangerous Games]]'', written by [[Jude Watson]].<ref name="DangerousGames" /> The Aesolian [[Star system/Legends|system]], and therefore the planet itself, was placed in grid square I-15 by the [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]''.<ref name="TEA">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref>

==Appearances==
*''[[Jedi Quest: The Dangerous Games]]'' {{1stm}}
